title: dracaena subtilis
intro: Dracaena subtilis, also known as the lesser or small dragon tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, commonly found in the tropical regions of Thailand and Cambodia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The leaves of the Dracaena subtilis plant are rich in flavonoids, which are believed to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the Dracaena subtilis plant are often used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
